antipattern.symptom: Author replaces 3-level prop-drilling with global Context, hurting re-render perf.
antipattern.fix: Use compound component pattern OR Zustand / Jotai per-feature store; Context for truly app-wide values only.

antipattern.symptom: Hook called inside conditional or loop; React rules-of-hooks violated.
antipattern.fix: ESLint react-hooks/rules-of-hooks plugin; fail CI on violation.

antipattern.symptom: Tree organised as `components/`, `hooks/`, `services/` flat; can't find what belongs together.
